artifact: METADATA MINTING BRENDA — Garbage Pail Parody #722b
boundary_conditions: Trading activity is not audit evidence
description: BEIGE BRENDA wasn’t satisfied auditing receipts. She started auditing metadata. Now every artifact, image, receipt, replay, hash, and folder gets interrogated before entering the ledger. In the Replay Protocol universe, Brenda knows the real fight is rarely over evidence — it’s over metadata. This parody artifact highlights tags, hashes, timestamps, provenance trails, and origin records that determine what can actually be trusted, replayed, or remembered.
collector_line: I’m not minting your vibe. I’m auditing your metadata.
tagline: Green only where the bytes prove themselves. Beige everywhere else.
